title: sida vitellina
intro: Sida vitellina, also known as the waxflower, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The medicinal properties of Sida vitellina have been reported to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Sida vitellina is often prepared as an infusion or a decoction for its herbal uses, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
